message:
Enrich audit trail with structured decision context across all surfaces

Previously, audit records for event mutations, IPC RPC calls, MCP tool
invocations, and workflow actions stored NULL in the decision_context
column, losing valuable forensic detail. This change populates
decision_context with structured JSON for every audit surface:

main.rs:
- Add build_event_mutation_decision_context() capturing actor, surface,
  event ID, operation, state, and label as structured evidence
- Add build_ipc_rpc_decision_context() capturing actor, summary, result,
  and request ID for IPC audit records
- Wire both into their respective record_*_audit call sites

mcp.rs:
- Add mcp_audit_decision_context() capturing surface, tool name, action
  kind, policy decision, result, elapsed_ms, and error code
- Wire into record_mcp_audit so every MCP tool call now carries full
  decision provenance
- Add integration tests verifying decision_context is persisted and
  round-trips through the storage layer

workflows/engine.rs:
- Add build_workflow_audit_decision_context() using the full
  DecisionContext struct with rule evaluation, evidence, and workflow
  metadata
- Wire into record_workflow_action replacing the previous None

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
